title: rubus × pseudorecognitus
intro: Rubus × pseudorecognitus is a hybrid species of raspberry that is commonly found in Japan. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content and its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudorecognitus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
